case_title: CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA N.A. VS. ANGIE WANG et al

docket_entries.description: BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-03-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-24-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA N.A.
